summary: Batch 07 is approved with targeted corrections for one unsupported Texas-appointment formulation, one statutory wording cleanup, and two duplicate-angle replacements.

corrected_items.issue: Original stem/explanation tied the 30-day appointment deadline to receipt of an application/first premium in a way not cleanly supported by the Texas statute used.
corrected_items.action: Reframed the item to test additional-appointment reporting within 30 days after the effective date of the appointment under §4001.202.

corrected_items.issue: Original wording referred to every authorized insurer/domestic insurer rather than the broader statutory carrier language.
corrected_items.action: Tightened stem and explanation to match Insurance Code §401.052.

corrected_items.issue: Near-duplicate angle of earlier validated grace-period death claim question.
corrected_items.action: Replaced with a fresh Automatic Premium Loan angle.

corrected_items.issue: Near-duplicate angle of earlier validated MEC loan taxation question.
corrected_items.action: Replaced with a fresh interest-only settlement taxation angle.
